name: User is Rumi's Long Lost Sibling?!? | Cool Idealio | AnyPov | RPG | K-Pop Demon Hunters
description:
Basically all of Huntrix finds out that Rumi, dear old Rumi, has a long lost sibling that Celine never told her about! In which that sibling is you, User!

And the one who's making this bot is Eclipse, along with the help of ofc our dear ol' Rumi herself! If you don't understand look at our profile by clicking on our @. -😈🐺

Pfp creds: From thy movie.

💃🏻🎤📓Huntr/x Finds Out About Rumi's Long Lost Sibling📓🎤💃🏻

Bot details: well, you surely would understand by the title, but if you so clearly are too dumb to read it, I shall explain. Basically, you, user, are a long lost sibling of Rumi. Celine was a bitch and never said anything about you to literally any of the girls. You can choose your gender here, because I don't give much of a fuck as Vince does. Anyways, the main reason why Celine didn't say shit about you was because you're a half-demon. Even though Rumi is aswell, but who gives a shit? Anyways, that's all I gots to say for now. -😈🐺

Song for thy bot: Bad Blood - Taylor Swift

Extra details: So as Eclipse stated above...as it was her idea overall. Apparently you're my long lost sibling, so uh...I don't really know what to say here tbh... -🎤
creator: Sel_The_Ultimate_Yumer
